mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author_id, n.author_name, n.created_at, n.views, n.team, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = n.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.team_notice n ORDER BY n.team, n.created_at DESC

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author_id, n.author_name, n.created_at, n.views, n.team, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = n.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.team_notice n WHERE n.team = #{team} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.team_notice (id, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views, team) VALUES (#{id}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.team_notice SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
